title: Flaky Irish Potato Crumble with Pickle Juice
description: A rich and flaky meal-prep dish featuring blanched potatoes in a savory blend of pickle juice, butter, and herbs for a unique twist on traditional Irish cuisine.
instructions: Wash and peel the potatoes. Cut them into thin slices.
In a large skillet, melt butter over medium heat. Add salt, black pepper, and pickle juice. Stir until well combined.
Add sliced potatoes to the skillet. Cook for about 5 minutes on each side until golden brown.
Transfer potato slices onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Leave some space between each slice.
Mix together all-purpose flour, baking powder, and vegetable oil in a small bowl. Pour over the cooked potato slices evenly.
Bake in preheated oven for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
Let it cool slightly before serving.
